display.purpose: The h1 thesis only. Archivo 700, upright spruce-ink <em> for emphasis.

title.purpose: List-item titles — rule names, tool links, lever names.

label.purpose: The single uppercase panel/field-label treatment. One size, weight, tracking.

readout.purpose: Martian Mono — every figure the slider changes. Figures only, never words.

shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: The instrument frame only — separation, not a drop shadow. Dark: 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.3), 0 22px 46px -34px rgba(0,0,0,.7).

shadows.name: control
shadows.purpose: The slider thumb, so it reads as a physical control above its track. The only other shadow allowed.

motion.name: ease-instrument
motion.purpose: Ease-out for bars, chevron nudges, chart draw-in. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: chart-draw
motion.value: slsDraw .9s + slsFade 1.1s, once on first load
motion.purpose: One-time chart reveal; disabled under prefers-reduced-motion. No per-section scroll reveals.

components.name: Instrument Panel
components.description: The signature framed dial — the chart and first-class readouts live inside one. Flat surface, hairline border, one soft lift.
components.html:
Fig. 1 — Lifetime repaid by salary · Plan 2Peak £124,361
Instrument surface
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #FAFBFA; border: 1px solid #DBE1DE; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(19,27,24,.03), 0 14px 34px -30px rgba(19,27,24,.20); padding: 1.2rem; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-cap { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: .6rem; } .ds-panel-t { font-size: .8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #4F5955; } .ds-panel-peak { font-family: 'Martian Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: .8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #A8482F; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -.01em; } .ds-panel-body { color: #656E68; font-size: .875rem; padding: 1.4rem 0; }

components.name: Readout Metric Cell
components.description: One quadrant of the four-metric readout — an engraved label, a mono figure with subordinated currency, a chevron; the whole cell is a drill-down link.
components.html:
Total repaid
£114,526
components.css: .ds-metric { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .5rem; min-height: 118px; padding: .9rem 1rem 1rem; background: #FAFBFA; border: 1px solid #DBE1DE; border-radius: 12px; text-decoration: none; color: #131B18; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background .15s ease; } .ds-metric-top { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: .5rem; } .ds-metric-k { font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #094A37; } .ds-chev { color: #656E68; transition: color .15s ease, transform .18s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-metric-v { font-family: 'Martian Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 1.9rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -.02em; line-height: 1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-cur { font-size: .64em; font-weight: 500; color: #656E68; margin-right: .05em; } .ds-metric:hover { background: #E7EBE9; } .ds-metric:hover .ds-chev { color: #0C5C44; transform: translateX(2px); } .ds-metric:focus-visible { outline: none; background: #E7EBE9; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #0C5C44; }

components.name: Scenario Preset
components.description: A selectable salary-preset button-card. Resting is a quiet outline; selected turns spruce with an accent wash.
components.css: .ds-scen { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .15rem; line-height: 1.2; text-align: left; border: 1px solid #DBE1DE; border-radius: 9px; padding: .5rem .7rem; background: #FAFBFA; color: #4F5955; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .15s, background .15s, color .15s; } .ds-scen b { font-weight: 600; font-size: .875rem; color: #131B18; letter-spacing: -.01em; } .ds-scen span { font-size: .6875rem; color: #4F5955; } .ds-scen:hover { border-color: #4F5955; } .ds-scen[aria-pressed='true'] { border-color: #0C5C44; background: #EAF1EE; } .ds-scen[aria-pressed='true'] b { color: #094A37; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Provenance chip — engraved label with a spruce dot. Carries 'GOV.UK sourced'.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .4rem; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4F5955; border: 1px solid #DBE1DE; border-radius: 6px; padding: .34rem .55rem; background: #FAFBFA; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #0C5C44; flex: none; }

components.name: Share Button
components.description: Outline utility button. Copied state turns spruce-ink.
components.css: .ds-share { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .45rem; height: 34px; padding: 0 .8rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #DBE1DE; background: #FAFBFA; color: #131B18; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: .875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .15s, background .15s, color .15s; } .ds-share:hover { border-color: #4F5955; } .ds-share:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0C5C44; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Theme Icon Button
components.description: 34x34 icon button holding the light/dark toggle. Icon lifts to Ink on hover.
components.html: <button class='ds-iconbtn' type='button' aria-label='Toggle theme'><svg width='17' height='17' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.8' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M20 14.5A8 8 0 1 1 9.5 4a6.3 6.3 0 0 0 10.5 10.5z'/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-iconbtn { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #DBE1DE; background: #FAFBFA; display: grid; place-items: center; color: #4F5955; cursor: pointer; transition: color .15s, border-color .15s, background .15s; } .ds-iconbtn:hover { color: #131B18; border-color: #4F5955; } .ds-iconbtn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0C5C44; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Salary Slider
components.description: The primary control. Spruce fill on a sunk track, a spruce-ringed disc thumb that scales on hover.
components.html: <input class='ds-slider' type='range' min='0' max='100' value='45' aria-label='Salary' style='--fill:45%'>
components.css: .ds-slider { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 100%; height: 22px; background: transparent; margin: 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-runnable-track { height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0C5C44 0 var(--fill,45%), #E7EBE9 var(--fill,45%) 100%); } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 18px; height: 18px; margin-top: -6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #FAFBFA; border: 3px solid #0C5C44; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.25); transition: transform .12s ease, box-shadow .12s ease; } .ds-slider:hover::-webkit-slider-thumb { transform: scale(1.14); } .ds-slider:active::-webkit-slider-thumb { transform: scale(1.06); box-shadow: 0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.3); } .ds-slider:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0C5C44; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 3px; }

components.name: Principal / Interest Split Bar
components.description: The interest viz inside a readout quadrant — a spruce principal segment against a brick interest segment, with a mono key.
components.html: Principal 39%Interest 61%
components.css: .ds-split-wrap { font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 320px; } .ds-split { display: flex; height: 12px; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; background: #E7EBE9; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #DBE1DE; } .ds-seg-p { height: 100%; background: #0C5C44; } .ds-seg-i { height: 100%; background: #A8482F; } .ds-split-key { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: .5rem 1rem; margin-top: .55rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-kk { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .45rem; font-size: .8125rem; color: #4F5955; } .ds-kk b { font-family: 'Martian Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #131B18; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -.015em; } .ds-dot-p, .ds-dot-i { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 3px; flex: none; } .ds-dot-p { background: #0C5C44; } .ds-dot-i { background: #A8482F; }

narrative.overview: The page is a calibrated measuring instrument, not a marketing site. Its whole job is trust: a middle earner should read the numbers and believe them, because the surface behaves like a spec sheet from a lab bench, not a fintech landing page. Every figure is a live readout; every panel is a framed dial; every claim is sourced to GOV.UK in the same breath it is made. The system is dense and quiet — it layers tone (paper → surface → sunk) and draws structure with 1px hairlines and two heavy 2px ink rules that bracket the instrument like the edges of a device. There is exactly one brand color, spruce green, carrying every affordance, and exactly one signal color, brick, reserved for the costly peak. It rejects the fintech hero-metric template and, more importantly, the editorial uppercase-mono wash: labels are sans, metadata is sans, and mono is quarantined to the figures.
keyCharacteristics: One brand color (spruce #0C5C44), one signal color (brick #A8482F), everything else tonal neutral.
Monospace is figures only; every word, including labels, is Archivo.
Flat surfaces; depth comes from hairlines and tonal layering, not drop shadows.
Cool, spruce-biased neutrals — never a warm cream/paper ground.
Both themes designed at the token level with equal care; nothing is a naive invert.
Sourcing is on the surface: GOV.UK sourced and updated date ride the hero, not the fine print.

rules.name: The Spruce-Only Rule
rules.body: There is one accent hue. No second brand color, no gradients, no per-section palettes. Affordance is spruce; if a new element needs to signal interactive, it turns spruce, it does not introduce a color.

rules.name: The One-Signal Rule
rules.body: Brick is the cost color and nothing else — the peak marker, the interest segment, upward (worse) deltas. Never decoration, never a heading, never a hover. On any screen it should cover well under 10% of the surface; its scarcity is what makes 'this is expensive' legible.

rules.name: The Figures-Are-Mono Rule
rules.body: Martian Mono is reserved for numeric readouts. Every word — including uppercase labels — is Archivo. Never set a label or sentence in mono, never a figure in sans. This boundary is the system's signature; breaking it collapses the instrument back into the rejected uppercase-mono wash.

rules.name: The Subordinated-Unit Rule
rules.body: In a figure the digits are the subject. The £ sign drops to 0.64em in Faint (.cur); unit words drop to 0.58em sans in Soft (.unit). £114,526 reads with the number dominant.

rules.name: The Four-Weight Rule
rules.body: Only 400 / 500 / 600 / 700 exist. Middle weights render identically on non-Apple fallbacks, so they are banned. Hierarchy comes from size and color.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. To separate two things, use a tone step or a 1px hairline, not a shadow. Shadows are for the panel frame and the slider thumb — nothing else earns one.

rules.name: The Bracket Rule
rules.body: The page is bracketed by two 2px Ink rules — the nameplate's bottom border and the footer's top border — like the edges of a device chassis. Everything between is 1px hairlines. Two heavy rules is the frame; add no more.

dos: Do keep Martian Mono for figures only, and set every word — labels included — in Archivo.
Do subordinate the £ sign (.cur) and unit words (.unit) so the digit is the subject of every figure.
Do use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on every figure the slider changes, so digits don't jitter.
Do reserve brick #A8482F for cost — the peak, interest, worse deltas — and let spruce #0C5C44 carry every affordance.
Do draw structure with 1px Hair dividers and the two 2px Ink bracket rules; keep surfaces flat and layer tone for depth.
Do keep the four-metric breakdown as ONE panel split by 1px seams, each quadrant carrying its own differentiated viz.
Do design both themes at the token level with equal care; never a naive invert.
Do keep provenance on the surface — trust is the page's first job.
donts: Don't set labels or sentences in monospace, and don't set figures in sans — the uppercase-mono wash is the editorial reflex this redesign stripped out.
Don't add a second accent hue, a gradient, or gradient text (background-clip: text). One brand color, one signal color.
Don't use glassmorphism or decorative drop shadows; the only shadows are the panel lift and the slider thumb.
Don't wrap the four metrics in four separate cards, and never nest a card inside a card — the readout is a single quadrant panel.
Don't use side-stripe borders (a border-left > 1px as a colored accent) on any callout or list item.
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section, or 01 / 02 / 03 numbered markers as scaffolding. Numbering is earned only where the content is a genuine enumerated set.
Don't use a warm cream / sand / paper ground; the neutrals are cool and spruce-biased by design.
Don't put grey or Soft text on the spruce brand mark or any spruce fill — use On-Accent (#F5FAF7).
Don't introduce a solid spruce 'primary' CTA button that out-shouts the instrument; primary actions are the readout drill-cells and presets.
